All tasks complete. Here's the build summary:

---

## Build summary

**Backend:** git worktrees  
**Plan:** `docs/plans/2026-05-29-text_toolkit_implementation/` — Status: **Done**  
**Gates:** both disabled (self-report only, as specified)

| Task | File | Elapsed | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 — tokenizer | `text_toolkit/tokenizer.py` | 42.3s | Done |
| 02 — normalizer | `text_toolkit/normalizer.py` | 33.6s | Done |
| 03 — frequency | `text_toolkit/frequency.py` | 42.3s | Done |
| 04 — pipeline & exports | `text_toolkit/pipeline.py` | 49.8s | Done |

**Implementations:**
- `tokenize` — `re.findall(r'[A-Za-z0-9]+', text)`: splits on non-alphanumeric runs, preserves case, no empty tokens
- `normalize` — lowercases each token and filters the stop-word set `{a, an, the, of, and, to, in}`
- `word_counts` / `top_terms` — compose `tokenize → normalize → count`; `top_terms` sorts by `(-count, term)`
- `summarize` — returns `{'tokens': len(tokenize(text)), 'terms': len(word_counts(text)), 'top': top_terms(text, limit)}`

**`__init__.py`** — already re-exported all five callables; no changes needed.

**`test_smoke.py`** — 2/2 passed on final integration tip (`master`). All spec example assertions verified end-to-end.
